title: About
bio: I'm Sal All — a developer, researcher, and photographer based in Sicily. I work at the intersection of algorithms, data, and visual thinking.

My technical work spans algorithm design and analysis, software development, machine learning, and data science. I'm particularly interested in making complex computational ideas accessible through interactive visualization.
Away from the keyboard I photograph — chasing light, geometry, and the small decisive moments that most people walk past. The same precision that makes a good algorithm makes a good photograph.
bio_note: This site is a living index: work in progress, updated as new projects and notes accumulate.
